chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 558 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2838/2019 3. For hearing of CMA No.2839/2019 4. For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the applicant Mr. Pervaiz Iqbal Kasi, advocate for respondent Under instructions learned counsel does not press this reference as questions formulated are factual in nature and the learned Tribunal is the last fact finding forum in the statutory hierarchy. In view hereof, this reference application is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
